variants: Chiara Gonzalez currently resides in Hazelmead Bluff, where she thrives as a game designer for Oaken Wheel Games. Originally hailing from Juniperwell Terrace, her passion for gaming was cultivated during her studies at Ultraviolet College. Over the course of her career, Chiara has garnered respect and admiration in the industry, receiving the Yearning Yew Tribute in acknowledgment of her outstanding creative contributions.
